posts.author: bcr (CS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Enable certain form responses (such as statuses or people) to be set as default, so that the most common responses are pre-filled and can be changed if needed. For example, in a Priority field, “Normal” can be the default, and the form responder doesn’t need to search for it in a drop-down (unless they want to change it to Low or High priority).

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to achieve the ability to set defaults for certain form fields—not based on account info or URL parameters, just selecting a default status or person (for example) from the options provided.
